name: Atlantic Express
owner_or_parent: n/a (record appears to conflate two unrelated entities)
principals: Steven Cordell (listed as President in source record; not verified for either entity)
recent_news: Original Atlantic Express Corp (Staten Island, NY) was the 5th-largest school bus operator in the US/Canada; filed Chapter 11 and ceased operations end of 2013 after ATU 1181 rejected wage concessions; CA business sold to Student Transportation of America in 2014. The entity currently at 2940 W 36th St, Chicago (atlanticexpresscorp.com, 773-847-8670) is an unrelated international freight forwarder / NVOCC (auto export, ocean/air freight) - NOT a school bus operator.
fit_notes: NOT A TUCK-IN TARGET. School-bus Atlantic Express has been defunct since 2013; the active company at the address in the source data is an international freight forwarder, not a student transport operator. Remove from pipeline.
